entries.threat: Attacker injects malformed CAN frames via SocketCAN interface to cause buffer overread
entries.mitigation: validate_frame called before every send; data length bounded by CAN_XL_MAX_DATA_LEN=2048

entries.threat: Attacker replays captured safety-critical E2E-protected messages
entries.mitigation: E2E sequence counter (REQ-SAFETY-003) and gap detection (REQ-SAFETY-005) prevent replay

entries.threat: Silent data corruption in CAN payload undetected by upper layer
entries.mitigation: CRC-16/CCITT-FALSE E2E header (REQ-SAFETY-002) detects single and burst errors

entries.threat: Bus flooding: high-frequency sends saturate subscriber channels causing frame loss
entries.mitigation: Back-pressure policy (REQ-VIRT-005) and drop_count MetricsProvider field for monitoring

entries.threat: ISO-TP DoS: attacker sends First Frame but no Consecutive Frames, blocking Recv indefinitely
entries.mitigation: Context-based timeout (REQ-ISOTP-005) bounds all blocking receive operations

entries.threat: Spoofed CAN frame with forged source address on J1939 bus
entries.mitigation: Application layer must use E2E protection (safety module) for authenticated payloads; J1939 source address is informational only
